arabic: عن أم سلمة رضى الله عنها قالت‏:‏ كان أحب الثياب إلى رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم القميص‏.‏((رواه أبو داود والترمذي))

english.narrator: Umm Salamah (May Allah be pleased with her) reported:
english.text:
Out of all garments, the Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) liked the Qamees the best.

.

Editor's note: The Qamees is a modest, traditional outfit thought to resemble what is now referred to as a thawb.
